description: Values returned by Rapid.CDN single frontend node instanciation

slave-instance-information-list.description: JSON list with the information of the slaves served by the frontend node. Published only when extra slave instances are configured.

kedifa-csr-url.description: URL on which the frontend node publishes its Kedifa CSR sent to caucase.

backend-client-csr-url.description: URL on which the frontend node publishes its Backend Client CSR sent to caucase.

csr-certificate.description: Certificate used to serve data on the CSR URLs.

backend-haproxy-statistic-url.description: URL exposing the backend HAProxy statistics of the frontend node.

trafficserver-introspection-url.description: URL exposing Traffic Server introspection of the frontend node.
